action.reasoning: Observation: Best so far = 0.6686 with best.pt + v3.pt ensemble. best+v4 got 0.6634, best+v3+v4 got 0.6587. v3 specifically pairs well with best. Have 2.3h, 9 iters. Analysis: Try v3+v4 ensemble (skip best.pt). Or try weighted ensemble. Actually, let's try a different angle - logit adjustment based on training class prior to counter the rare-class boosting. Or simpler: try ensemble of best+v3 with weight on best (which alone was 0.6644). Let me try weighted: best(2x) + v3(1x). Decision: Modify predict.py to accept weights, or simpler—just duplicate best in checkpoint string. Actually the current predict.py averages by run count, duplicating best.pt twice would weight it 2x.
